inputs.label: Loan Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total principal amount borrowed for education expenses

businessContext_i18n.en: Total principal amount borrowed for education expenses
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eğitim masrafları için borçlanılan toplam anapara tutarı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant total du principal emprunté pour les frais d'études
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto total del principal prestado para gastos educativos

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fixed annual interest rate on the student loan

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed annual interest rate on the student loan
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öğrenci kredisine uygulanan sabit yıllık faiz oranı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'intérêt annuel fixe du prêt étudiant
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de interés anual fija del préstamo estudiantil

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Repayment period in years after any deferment ends

businessContext_i18n.en: Repayment period in years after any deferment ends
businessContext_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir erteleme dönemi sonrası geri ödeme süresi (yıl olarak)
businessContext_i18n.de: Rückzahlungszeitraum in Jahren nach Ende der Stundung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Période de remboursement en années après la fin de tout différé
businessContext_i18n.es: Período de pago en años después de que finalice cualquier aplazamiento

inputs.label: Deferment Period
inputs.businessContext: Number of months before repayment starts, during which interest accrues and capitalizes

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of months before repayment starts, during which interest accrues and capitalizes
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geri ödeme başlamadan önceki ay sayısı; bu sürede faiz tahakkuk eder ve anaparaya eklenir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Monate vor Beginn der Rückzahlung, in denen Zinsen anfallen und kapitalisiert werden
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de mois avant le début du remboursement, durant lesquels les intérêts courent et se capitalisent
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de meses antes de que comience el pago, durante los cuales los intereses se acumulan y capitalizan

formulas.monthlyPayment: effectivePrincipal * monthlyRate * (1 + monthlyRate) ** n / ((1 + monthlyRate) ** n - 1)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
